name: Sling Stacking Steel Outdoor Patio Chaise Lounge Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Relax on a summer's afternoon in your backyard with this Sling Stacking Steel Outdoor Patio Chaise Lounge from Room Essentials™. Made from weather- and rust-resistant steel to help keep it protected from the elements, this chaise lounge features a seat and back that let you soak up some sun in comfort. Plus, the foldable design provides you with extra storage or display space. In a solid black hue, this stacking chaise lounge blends seamlessly into your space.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
